{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Gate to the Territory
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Gate to the Territory]] can only be opened by those descended from the first [[King of Damasca]] and requires a blood sacrifice.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23">''House of Blades'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Structures]]
